Class FieldWatchpoint

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractBreakpoint
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.strategy.breakpoint.FieldWatchpoint
All Implemented Interfaces:
IBreakpoint
public class FieldWatchpoint extends AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
ThisFieldWatchpoint represents a Java watchpoint and is responsible to tell the debugger to stop execution when the respective variable is accessed or modified.

  • Constructor Details

    • FieldWatchpoint

      public FieldWatchpoint(boolean enabled, int hitCount, String fieldName, boolean isAcces, boolean isModification, KeYJavaType containerKJT, Proof proof)
      Creates a new FieldWatchpoint.
      Parameters:
      enabled - flag if the Breakpoint is enabled
      hitCount - the number of hits after which the execution should hold at this breakpoint
      fieldName - the field to watch
      isAcces - flag to watch for accesses
      isModification - flag to watch for modifications
      containerKJT - the type of the element containing the breakpoint
      proof - the Proof that will be executed and should stop

  • Method Details

    • isBreakpointHit

      public boolean isBreakpointHit(SourceElement activeStatement, RuleApp ruleApp, Node node)
      Determines if the breakpoint represented by this BreakpointStopConition is triggered. Override this method in order to suspend execution when a breakpoint is hit.
      Specified by:
      isBreakpointHit in interface IBreakpoint
      Overrides:
      isBreakpointHit in class AbstractHitCountBreakpoint
      Parameters:
      activeStatement - the activeStatement of the node
      ruleApp - the applied RuleApp
      node - the current node
      Returns:
      true if execution should hold

      Returns:
